'''Reading and the Soulbound''' is one of the magic systems of the Willverse.

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The magic system revolves around the connection between humans and powerful entities known as [[Soulbound]]. These individuals borrow powers from beings called [[Elders]] or [[Kameira]], a rare status with only a few practitioners on the continent. During an [[Awakening]] procedure, a [[Soulbound]] bonds with a [[Vessel]], which serves as a source of power that can be sealed. [[Vessels]] are entities or internal powers that react to the user's emotions and communicate through impressions, impulses, and pressure instead of speech. 

A central component of this system is [[Intent]], a property that can be bound into materials like copper poles or wood. By lending [[Intent]] to an object over time, the item becomes more effective at performing its intended function. Practitioners can focus their [[Intent]] with extreme precision, much like a scalpel. One specific technique is [[Reading]], which allows a user to focus their mind on an object, sense a ship, or ensure that a vessel accepts new additions. [[Reading]] can also be used to perceive entities with awareness, such as the [[Elderspawn]], though reading the body of a [[Great Elder]] is a dangerous practice to be avoided. 

A significant risk for those using these abilities is Reader's burn, a condition resulting from overexertion that can persist for months. Despite this condition, certain presences can still be felt. The system also involves [[Soulbound Vessels]], which are powerful objects commanded by a [[Soulbound]] individual and responsive to their [[Intent]]. While most [[Great Elders]] view themselves as benefactors, they are immensely powerful; for instance, a [[Great Elder]] once blighted the weather, and it is possible for a mortal to be bound to the heart of one.}}

== Notable items ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Syphren]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Heart of Nakothi]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyrfang]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Emperor's crown (The Elder Empire: Sea)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Emperor's armor]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Spear of Tharlos]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Heart (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|shears}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Heart (The Elder Empire: Sea)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[quicklamp]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urzaia's black hatchets]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Navigator’s ship]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Emperor's crown (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|quicklamps}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera's shears]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin's sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Awakened blade (The Elder Empire: Sea)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[cutlass]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kelarac’s mark]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|spades}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|spade}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera's shear]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[White Sun medallion]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|shadeglasses}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion’s Vessel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Awakened weapons]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperial artifacts]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach's sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch coat]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Syphren, the Whispering Death]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|alchemical charge}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jerri's Vessel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alchemical munitions]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|paralyzing needles}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera's Vessel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch spikes]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperial seal]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champion potion]]}} • {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[emerald (The Elder Empire: Sea)]]}}

[[Category:Magic systems]]
